chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-293 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on urgent application 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 15.8.2025 Mr.Saddam Hussain Keerio, Advocate a/w Petitioners ************ 1. Granted. 2to4. Through this petition, petitioners seek protection. Counsel for the petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2, which has annoyed the private respondents, who are causing them undue harassment. Mr.Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice, and submits that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the petitioners. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioners, as and when approached. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the concerned S.S.P for information and compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
